title: No Day Reset
description: Prevents the DayTime (day) counter from going down in any way.
body:
This mod simply prevents the overworld's DayTime counter from ever going down, by continuously saving the highest value. It starts counting when the world has finished loading, so **if the time was changed before the world has loaded it won't set it back to the highest.**

I made this mod for my The Broken Script (by Wendigodrip) modpack, since the 1.20.1 version of that mod can reset the day counter. Feel free to use and include anywhere and anyhow, this mod is very basic and was written in around 10 lines.
